## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:db -w apps/api` if backend/spatial changes were made

## Risk Areas

- [ ] Spatial SQL / PostGIS
- [ ] Cache keys / Redis
- [ ] Auth / entitlements
- [ ] Billing gates
- [ ] Frontend fallback behavior
- [ ] Map interaction behavior
